ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the project was last updated */,
  "github_repo_url" TEXT /* URL of the GitHub repository */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of the project (e.g., web, mobile, desktop) */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project version */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version (e.g., v1.0, v2.1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "released_at" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of the version (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the contributor is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the contributor was added to the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor (e.g., developer, maintainer) */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commits" (
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commit */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the commit was made to */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the commit */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "message" TEXT /* Commit message */,
  "committed_at" TEXT /* Date the commit was made */,
  "commit_type" TEXT /* Type of the commit (e.g., feature, bugfix, refactor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES project_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commits_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commit_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "commit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commit the file was changed in */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., code, image) */,
  "added" INTEGER /* Whether the file was added in the commit */,
  "removed" INTEGER /* Whether the file was removed in the commit */,
  "modified" INTEGER /* Whether the file was modified in the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commit_files_commit_id FOREIGN KEY ("commit_id") REFERENCES commits ("commit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the issue is associated with */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the issue is associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of the issue (e.g., bug, feature, improvement) */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor assigned to the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES project_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is associated with */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., question, answer, note) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue being assigned */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor being assigned */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date the issue was assigned */,
  "assignment_type" TEXT /* Type of the assignment (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_assignments_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_labels" (
  "label_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each label */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the label is assigned to */,
  "label_name" TEXT /* Name of the label */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the label was created */,
  "label_color" TEXT /* Color of the label */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("label_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_labels_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the priority is assigned to */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Level of the priority (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the priority was created */,
  "priority_order" INTEGER /* Order of the priority (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_priorities_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the status is assigned to */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the status was created */,
  "status_order" INTEGER /* Order of the status (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_statuses_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of the user (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role is assigned to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
